articles.title: Rugrats is the retro game revival no one saw coming
articles.summary: From 8-bit 2D to low-poly 3D, Rugrats: Retro Rewind is a treasure trove of Nicktoons nostalgia.

articles.title: Advanced Tree Counting: Mathematical Layouts With `sibling-index()` And `sibling-count()`
articles.summary: Meet `sibling-index()` and `sibling-count()`. Staggered cascade effect in one line of CSS without `:nth-child()` rules or JS workarounds. Works for 5 items or 5,000.

articles.title: Four Levels Of Customer Understanding
articles.summary: What people say, feel, think, and do are often very different things. To understand the underlying reasons for user behavior, it helps to look beyond the surface and explore hidden motivations, root causes, and the different layers of reality that shape how people act. Brought to you by Measuring UX Impact, **friendly video course on UX** and design patterns by Vitaly.

articles.title: How this secret 2D trick can speed up your 3D modelling
articles.summary: Making your 3D models more detailed can be time-consuming, but it needn’t be.
